hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "[Self-check] (1) General — review answer from multiple angles. (2) Security — injection, XSS, auth, hardcoded secrets. (3) Coding Rule/logic — confirm code builds without errors, no coding standard violations such as hardcoding, logic matches requirements. (4) Tests — run go test ./... or npm test, confirm pass. Fix issues before reporting done. (5) Docs — after all issues are resolved, if any project documentation files are related to the task, update them too."}'

hooks.prompt: Run the /test skill: execute `go test ./...` in backend-go/ and `npm run build` in frontend/. Report pass/fail for each. If anything fails, show the error output.
